# Getting help with SpatiumDDI

Thanks for using SpatiumDDI! Here's the fastest way to get the help you need.

## 💬 Chat — Discord (best for questions)

Join the community Discord — the quickest place to ask a question, share a
setup, or just say hi:

**👉 https://discord.com/invite/ANJAnvg2Dd**

Good for: "how do I…", deployment / appliance questions, sanity checks,
showing off your topology, and general discussion.

## 🗣️ GitHub Discussions

For longer-form questions, design ideas, and Q&A you'd like to keep
searchable: **[Discussions](https://github.com/spatiumddi/spatiumddi/discussions)**.

## 🐛 Bugs & feature requests — GitHub Issues

Found a bug or want to request a feature? Open an
**[issue](https://github.com/spatiumddi/spatiumddi/issues)**. Please include:

- what you expected vs. what happened,
- your deployment shape (Docker Compose / Kubernetes / OS appliance),
- the SpatiumDDI version (footer of the UI, or your image / ISO tag),
- relevant logs (`docker compose logs -f api worker`), with any secrets redacted.

## 📚 Docs

The full documentation lives at **https://spatiumddi.github.io/spatiumddi/**.

---

Please **don't** report security vulnerabilities through public issues —
see [`SECURITY.md`](SECURITY.md) if present, or raise it privately.
